lint.output: 1 pre-existing warning in flow-canvas.tsx (documented in LEARNINGS.md), 0 errors, 0 new warnings in changed files

notes: Created tool-analysis-view.tsx with AnalysisStep + StepToolData exported interfaces and 4 analysis sections: Spend Summary (monthly/annual/by-status), Overlapping Tools (steps with 2+ tools, sorted by combined cost), Unused Tools (tools with no step assignments), Coverage Gaps (steps without any tool, sorted by frequency_per_month desc). Toggle via BarChart3 button in summary sidebar header. page.tsx fetches steps (id,name,section_id,tab_id,frequency_per_month) in parallel, then step_tools (id,step_id,tool_id) sequentially via .in('tool_id', toolIds). Step navigation uses step.tab_id directly. onSelectTool callback from ToolAnalysisView closes analysis mode and opens tool detail panel on canvas.
